docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Everything you need to integrate with the WuguHub API

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.description: Get up and running in minutes
quickStart.step1Desc: Sign up and create an API key from your dashboard
quickStart.step2Desc: Use any OpenAI-compatible SDK or make direct HTTP requests
quickStart.step3Desc: Send a chat completion request to our unified endpoint

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.description: All API requests require authentication using a Bearer token
authentication.note: Keep your API keys secure. Never expose them in client-side code.

chatCompletions.title: Chat Completions
chatCompletions.description: Create a chat completion with the specified model
chatCompletions.parameters: model (required), messages (required), temperature, top_p, max_tokens, stream

rateLimits.title: Rate Limits
rateLimits.description: Rate limits vary by plan and are applied per API key
rateLimits.headers: Check X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset headers

errorCodes.title: Error Codes
errorCodes.description: Standard error responses follow the OpenAI error format

codes.401: Unauthorized — Invalid or missing API key
codes.404: Not Found — Model or resource not found
codes.502: Provider Error — Upstream LLM provider error
